items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: oscar doesn't think reg changes in 27/28 will fix current issues: "change in fuel flow & le…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：Oscar认为27/28的Reg改变不会解决当前问题:"燃料流量的改变和部署的减少不会解决引擎问题. 当制造商理解引擎时,它会变得更好, 但事实上,它甚至是一个问题 是一个相当烦人 不只是我自己。"
items.summary: oscar doesn't think reg changes in 27/28 will fix current issues: "change in fuel flow & less deployment arent going to fix engine issues. it'll get better as manufacturers understand the engine, but the fact that it's even a problem is pretty annoying for more than just myself" https://t.co/TIvSQNvRKj

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: oscar was critical of the 2026 PUs: "when you've got quali decided by computers behaving or mis…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：Oscar曾批评2026PU:"当你得到由计算机行为或行为不当决定的夸利时,这是相当糟糕的去赛跑方式. 你从夸里过来,看看数据,想,`我和我队友一样',你却落后了十分之二。 这感觉不太好"
items.summary: oscar was critical of the 2026 PUs: "when you've got quali decided by computers behaving or misbehaving, it's a pretty crap way of going racing. you come in from quali, look at data and think, ‘i'm on par with my teammate’, yet you're 2 tenths behind. it's not a nice feeling." https://t.co/52bNLCcyOO

items.title: X post from @oscarpiastri81: Had a very short work trip to Shanghai, and as I was checking out of my hotel (wearing an OP81…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @oscarpiastri81：前往上海的工作时间很短,当我正在我的酒店(穿着OP81衬衫)退房时,一名员工喊出"OscarOscar!",并给我看了她的手机屏幕. 🥹 无法确定这次接触她的几率 但我只想说 这种短暂的交流让我非常高兴 我只希望我早点穿上衬衫 这样我们今天才能见面
items.summary: Had a very short work trip to Shanghai, and as I was checking out of my hotel (wearing an OP81 shirt), one of the employees called out, "Oscar, Oscar!" and showed me her phone screen. 🥹 Not sure what the odds are of this ever reaching her, but I just wanted to say that this short interaction made me so incredibly happy. I only wish I'd worn my shirt earlier so we could've met before today. 🧡
items.summary_zh: 前往上海的工作时间很短,当我正在我的酒店(穿着OP81衬衫)退房时,一名员工喊出"OscarOscar!",并给我看了她的手机屏幕. 🥹 无法确定这次接触她的几率 但我只想说 这种短暂的交流让我非常高兴 我只希望我早点穿上衬衫 这样我们今天才能见面

items.title: X post from @oscarsspiastree: Q: Could a corner be turned by this upgrade coming in Hungary? "I hope so but I mean the others…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @oscarsspiastree：问:这次升级能否在匈牙利出现? "我希望如此,但我的意思是,其他人不会袖手旁观. 其他人也会带来升级。 目前我们肯定有点不一致 这周末我们看起来好多了 即使是昨天 Q3也出现了动力装置异常 我的余下部分还不错 对 有很多事情 扭曲了画面 在目前。 我想我们最好能先爬到上面 但也有一些升级肯定有帮助 因为汽车在像今天这样的一天可以很快 但从中取出速度是非常艰难的,所以希望这能让我们更快,更连贯一些".
items.summary: Q: Could a corner be turned by this upgrade coming in Hungary? "I hope so but I mean the others aren't going to standing still. The others are going to be bringing upgrades as well. Definitely we're a bit inconsistent at the moment. This weekend we did look better. Even yesterday for myself, Q3 there was a power unit anomaly and the rest of my lap was good. Yeah. There's just a lot of things that skew the picture a bit at the moment. I think hopefully we can get on top of those bits first but also some upgrades will definitely help because the car can be quick on a day like today. But extracting the pace out of it is very very tough so hopefully that makes us quicker and a little bit more consistent."
items.summary_zh: 问:这次升级能否在匈牙利出现? "我希望如此,但我的意思是,其他人不会袖手旁观. 其他人也会带来升级。 目前我们肯定有点不一致 这周末我们看起来好多了 即使是昨天 Q3也出现了动力装置异常 我的余下部分还不错 对 有很多事情 扭曲了画面 在目前。 我想我们最好能先爬到上面 但也有一些升级肯定有帮助 因为汽车在像今天这样的一天可以很快 但从中取出速度是非常艰难的,所以希望这能让我们更快,更连贯一些".

items.summary: Q: "what about the contact with charles?" oscar: "yeah i lost the side board thing... okay maybe i shouldn't call it a side board, that's something you put in your hallway" NOTHING CAN TAKE HIS WHIMSY AWAY 😭😭😭 https://t.co/1RyGX5XGnj
items.summary_zh: 问:"和Charles的接触怎么样?" Oscar:"是的,我失去了侧板的事情... 好吧,也许我不应该把它叫做侧板, 那是你放在走廊里的东西"

items.title: X post from @oscarsspiastree: Q: What about that contact with Charles? "Yeah I lost the side board thing...okay maybe I shoul…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @oscarsspiastree：问:和查尔斯的接触怎么样? "是的,我失去了侧板的事情... 好吧,也许我不应该把它叫做侧板, 这是你放在你走廊的东西。 我失去了我的车的一部分 我不知道我该去哪里。 我同样感到惊讶的是,它没有任何结果。 显然你知道这是小接触。 这对我影响很大 可能对我们两个都造成很大的后果 但事情就是这样的 我觉得从那时起比赛就更困难了 之后的第一场比赛中,平衡受到很大打击。 我们得以在第二站得到一点补偿, 节奏又变快了, 但从那时起,它只是有点棘手的比赛。”
items.summary: Q: What about that contact with Charles? "Yeah I lost the side board thing...okay maybe I shouldn't call it a side board, that's something you put in your hallway. I lost parts of my car and I don't know where I was supposed to go. I was equally surprised that nothing came of it. Obviously you know it's small contact. It had big consequences for me. Could've had very big consequences for both of us but it is what it is. I think from then on the race was definitely more difficult. The balance suffered quite a lot for the first stint after that. We were able to compensate a bit in the second stint and the pace got better again but yeah it was just bit of a tricky race from then on."
items.summary_zh: 问:和查尔斯的接触怎么样? "是的,我失去了侧板的事情... 好吧,也许我不应该把它叫做侧板, 这是你放在你走廊的东西。 我失去了我的车的一部分 我不知道我该去哪里。 我同样感到惊讶的是,它没有任何结果。 显然你知道这是小接触。 这对我影响很大 可能对我们两个都造成很大的后果 但事情就是这样的 我觉得从那时起比赛就更困难了 之后的第一场比赛中,平衡受到很大打击。 我们得以在第二站得到一点补偿, 节奏又变快了, 但从那时起,它只是有点棘手的比赛。”

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: Q: "you think 4th fastest is now the reality for the team?" oscar: "i think so, we just need a…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：问:"你觉得现在第4个最快的球队是现实吗?" Oscar:"我认为如此,我们只需要再多一步. 车还是很硬的,显然损坏没有帮助。 虽然可能很快,但还是非常艰难".
items.summary: Q: "you think 4th fastest is now the reality for the team?" oscar: "i think so, we just need a step more. the car was still very tough to drive, and obviously the damage didn't help. it might've been quick, but it was still very tough." https://t.co/zWCt0KodH5
items.summary_zh: 问:"你觉得现在第4个最快的球队是现实吗?" Oscar:"我认为如此,我们只需要再多一步. 车还是很硬的,显然损坏没有帮助。 虽然可能很快,但还是非常艰难".

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: Q: "after a difficult race in silverstone how important was it for you to have a good race here…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：问:"在Silverstone上进行艰难的比赛之后,你在这里有一个好比赛有多重要?"Oscar:"这很重要,虽然这不是一场干净的比赛. 我觉得今天我们比较有竞争力了 "这是周末最积极的一次"
items.summary: Q: "after a difficult race in silverstone how important was it for you to have a good race here?" oscar: "it was important, although it wasn't a clean race. i think we were a bit more competitive today which was nice to see. that's the biggest positive from the weekend." https://t.co/MPqOwXr0P6
items.summary_zh: 问:"在Silverstone上进行艰难的比赛之后,你在这里有一个好比赛有多重要?"Oscar:"这很重要,虽然这不是一场干净的比赛. 我觉得今天我们比较有竞争力了 "这是周末最积极的一次"

(unlikely that anything will change but lewis is under investigation for unsafe release and oscar finished less than 5s behind 👀) https://t.co/l7G7XeZLtg

items.title: X post from @oscarsspiastree: Q: This is your favourite track, talk us through what makes it so enjoyable "I mean, there's ju…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @oscarsspiastree：问:这是你最喜欢的曲子, 告诉我们是什么让我们如此愉快。 “我的意思是,这里面有很多很酷的东西。 这些地方非常独特, 在森林的中间, 大量的海拔变化。 有很多独特的角落,也许其中一些地方 并不像他们今年的一样 但这只是一条很棒的赛道。 正常情况下,这里的比赛都不错 所以我们会看到今年的比赛结果 这是一个很酷的地方去赛跑。"
items.summary: Q: This is your favourite track, talk us through what makes it so enjoyable "I mean, there's just a lot of cool stuff about it. The locations pretty unique, in the middle of the forest, lots of elevation change. A lot of unique corners as well, maybe some of them aren't quite what they used to be this year but it's just an awesome track. Overtaking normally been pretty good here, the races so we'll see what we get this year. It's a cool place to be going racing."
items.summary_zh: 问:这是你最喜欢的曲子, 告诉我们是什么让我们如此愉快。 “我的意思是,这里面有很多很酷的东西。 这些地方非常独特, 在森林的中间, 大量的海拔变化。 有很多独特的角落,也许其中一些地方 并不像他们今年的一样 但这只是一条很棒的赛道。 正常情况下,这里的比赛都不错 所以我们会看到今年的比赛结果 这是一个很酷的地方去赛跑。"

items.title: X post from @oscarsspiastree: Q: : Do you feel the car has the pace to challenge in this race? "I think hopefully with Ferrar…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @oscarsspiastree：问:你觉得这辆车在这场比赛中有挑战的速度吗? "我希望与Ferrari 我们可以做一些事情 和马克思。 得等正觉. 我们目前和Mercedes的类别不同 但我们会想办法的 第一圈可能很有趣,希望我们能参与进来,看看我们能做些什么。”
items.summary: Q: : Do you feel the car has the pace to challenge in this race? "I think hopefully with Ferrari we can do something and with Max as well. We'll have to wait and see. We're in a different category to Mercedes at the moment but we'll see what we can do. The first lap could be interesting so hopefully we can get involved and see what we can do."
items.summary_zh: 问:你觉得这辆车在这场比赛中有挑战的速度吗? "我希望与Ferrari 我们可以做一些事情 和马克思。 得等正觉. 我们目前和Mercedes的类别不同 但我们会想办法的 第一圈可能很有趣,希望我们能参与进来,看看我们能做些什么。”

items.title: X post from @oscarsspiastree: Q: what was missing out there? "Just...just speed. Its not been particularly easy all weekend t…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @oscarsspiastree：问:外面漏了什么? "只是... 只是速度。" 说实话 整个周末都没那么容易 与车的平衡 挣扎,但是的,特别是今天 已经是一个相当大的磨损 任何一圈时间出来。 不容易的一天 但我们明天会看到我们能做些什么。”
items.summary: Q: what was missing out there? "Just...just speed. Its not been particularly easy all weekend to be honest. Struggling with the balance of the car but yeah today in particular has been a pretty big grind to get any lap time out of it. Not an easy day but we'll see what we can do tomorrow."
items.summary_zh: 问:外面漏了什么? "只是... 只是速度。" 说实话 整个周末都没那么容易 与车的平衡 挣扎,但是的,特别是今天 已经是一个相当大的磨损 任何一圈时间出来。 不容易的一天 但我们明天会看到我们能做些什么。”

items.title: X post from @oscarsspiastree: the distressed smile 😭😭 Q: What sort of race pace is there in the car? "We don't really know. W…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @oscarsspiastree：车厢里跑出什么样的跑步? "我们真的不知道. 在二练赛跑方面我们并没有做那么多圈 所以很难读到我们的位置 我们身边的契约非常紧凑 但我们可能就在后面 吾等见所取而取而取而取而取而取之也".
items.summary: the distressed smile 😭😭 Q: What sort of race pace is there in the car? "We don't really know. We didn't really do that many laps in FP2 in terms of race running so it's very hard to read where we are. The pact around us is very tight but we're probably just at the back of it. We'll see what we can do but it's not going to be easy."
items.summary_zh: 车厢里跑出什么样的跑步? "我们真的不知道. 在二练赛跑方面我们并没有做那么多圈 所以很难读到我们的位置 我们身边的契约非常紧凑 但我们可能就在后面 吾等见所取而取而取而取而取而取之也".

items.title: X post from @oscarsspiastree: Q: Has it been a little bit of a battle to find comfort in the car this weekend? "Yeah. It's be…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @oscarsspiastree：问:这周末在车上找慰藉是不是有点吵了? "对. 已而作是苦行相会. 我认为它开始 在一练, 但昨天,我们有一个问题。 所以,我错过了一点点二练, 但即使是我的跑圈都是很棘手的。 后于今日相同为相. 最终,它是一个有点更受人尊敬的,但这是一个艰难的周末,这是肯定的".
items.summary: Q: Has it been a little bit of a battle to find comfort in the car this weekend? "Yeah. It's been a bit of a struggle. I think it started okay in FP1 but then yesterday, we had an issue. So I missed a little bit of FP2 but even the laps I did were tricky. Then today, it's been the same story. Eventually it was a little bit more respectable but it's been a tough weekend that's for sure."
items.summary_zh: 问:这周末在车上找慰藉是不是有点吵了? "对. 已而作是苦行相会. 我认为它开始 在一练, 但昨天,我们有一个问题。 所以,我错过了一点点二练, 但即使是我的跑圈都是很棘手的。 后于今日相同为相. 最终,它是一个有点更受人尊敬的,但这是一个艰难的周末,这是肯定的".
